positive: Highly detailed, symmetrical composition of mystical jungle flora integrated with intricate geometric patterns. Central focus on an oversized, glowing bioluminescent lotus flower, surrounded by stylized vines, interwoven Mandalas, and sharp geometric crystalline structures. The style must be modern neo-tribal engraving meets ethereal watercolor, rendered in deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and metallic gold accents. Use strong, clean silhouettes and thick linework for maximum print contrast. The composition should feel balanced and harmonious, perfect for a central apparel print. Full bleed, vibrant, high contrast, flat graphic design elements, clean lines, vector art.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, noisy, artifacts, blur, text, watermarks, grain, low quality, bad anatomy, cropped, signature, human figures, excessive detail, gradients, messy, dirty, logo, trademark
